name: JoAi: Studio Send

description.en: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.de: Sende eine Nachricht oder Anweisung an das Media Studio, um ein Projekt zu erstellen oder zu aktualisieren.
description.es: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.fr: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.ro: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.it: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.

bot: Use this when the user wants to create or continue a studio project — generative video, slideshow, or source-video clipping.

inputs.name: Message

description.en: Your instruction or message to the studio
description.de: Deine Anweisung oder Nachricht an das Studio
description.es: Your instruction or message to the studio
description.fr: Your instruction or message to the studio
description.ro: Your instruction or message to the studio
description.it: Your instruction or message to the studio

inputs.bot: The instruction or creative brief for the studio.

inputs.name: Project ID

description.en: Existing project ID to continue working on
description.de: Bestehende Projekt-ID, an der weitergearbeitet werden soll
description.es: Existing project ID to continue working on
description.fr: Existing project ID to continue working on
description.ro: Existing project ID to continue working on
description.it: Existing project ID to continue working on

inputs.bot: The project hash ID. Omit to create a new project.

inputs.name: Output Type

description.en: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips
description.de: Primärer Ausgabetyp: video, slideshow oder clips
description.es: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips
description.fr: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips
description.ro: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips
description.it: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips

inputs.bot: Use 'clips' to extract short clips from a source video. Use 'video' for generative video. Use 'slideshow' for image sequences.

inputs.name: Source URL

description.en: Direct video URL for clips projects
description.es: Direct video URL for clips projects
description.fr: Direct video URL for clips projects
description.ro: Direct video URL for clips projects
description.it: Direct video URL for clips projects

inputs.bot: A direct .mp4, .mov, or .webm URL to use as the source video for clip extraction.

inputs.name: References

description.en: Comma-separated list of media hash IDs to use as reference assets
description.de: Kommagetrennte Liste von Medien-Hash-IDs, die als Referenz-Assets verwendet werden sollen
description.es: Comma-separated list of media hash IDs to use as reference assets
description.fr: Comma-separated list of media hash IDs to use as reference assets
description.ro: Comma-separated list of media hash IDs to use as reference assets
description.it: Comma-separated list of media hash IDs to use as reference assets

inputs.bot: Comma-separated media hash IDs from media_upload to use as project reference images.
